title: World Music Dance
description: A world music curiosity game where kids match musical clues to place cards and dance moves.
learningGoals: Notice that music styles can come from different places
Connect simple music clues with broad place symbols
Move safely to rhythm words like stomp, sway, spin, and bounce
interactionModel: choose-one tap cards after a spoken prompt
feedbackModel: Warm spoken praise and sparkle SFX on success; a miss gets a gentle wiggle, spoken nudge, and the prompt again.
credits: Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
